text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First the Satsuki Sho and then the Japanese
Derby. And now, Mejiro Ryan wins the Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The hope of the Mejiro family has taken all three
legs of the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Triple Crown under her belt, Mejiro
Ryan has achieved her dream of being successful
in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Honestly, no... not at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It feels like I'm floating on a cloud. I can't believe
it's real...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I mean, me? Beating McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but beating Ines, too? Really... I
really...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I really became the Triple Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's like a dream. The whole spectacle of it. And
all of the cheers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The Classics were my goal, of course. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Every single race was a desperate struggle. I ran
as fast as I could. Gave it my all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Even today at the Kikuka Sho... The fact that the
Triple Crown depended on this race wasn't even
in my thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (Still... today's win means so much to me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(I feel almost like I was able to show you I could
hold my own.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I think my heart has finally caught up with my
body.
choice_data_list: So, you're feeling more confident now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, a little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I have a long way to go. There's still so much
more to do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll work even harder from now on. Get bigger and
stronger...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep! You should be more confident, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, what's the star of the day still doing out
here? You're gonna be late to the party!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Party? What party?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What party? The party where we celebrate you
becoming Triple Crown champion, silly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait, r-really?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(I still can't see what lies ahead of me, but I'll
keep running and running.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(And one day, I'll be able to see it. I can believe
that now!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fresh wind blows... toward the future, where
unknown dreams await.
